# volcenginecc_cr_endpoint_acl_policy (Data Source)

Data Source schema for Volcengine::CR::EndpointAclPolicy



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the allowlist IPs
- `entry` (String) Allowlist IPs to be added
- `registry` (String) Name of the image repository instance. On the Instance List page in the Image Repository Console, obtain the instance name
- `type` (String) Network type of the allowlist; currently only Public is supported
